Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import re, httpx
r = httpx.get\(
    'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/',
    params={'q': 'site:modulargrid.net/e/ Chainsaw eurorack module'},
    headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(compatible; SynthShop/0.1\)'},
    timeout=10, follow_redirects=True,
\)
slugs = re.findall\(r'\(?:https?://\)?\(?:www\\.\)?modulargrid\\.net/e/\([\\w-]+\)', r.text\)
print\('All slugs:', slugs[:10]\)
skip = \('modules', 'forum', 'offers', 'vendors', 'racks', 'marketplace', 'about', 'users', 'search'\)
filtered = [s for s in slugs if not s.startswith\(skip\)]
print\('Filtered:', filtered[:5]\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import httpx, re
r = httpx.post\('https://www.modulargrid.net/e/modules/find',
    data={
        'ModulesSearchForm[name]': 'Chainsaw',
        'ModulesSearchForm[direction]': 'asc',
        'ModulesSearchForm[order]': 'popular',
    },
    headers={
        'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7\)',
        'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
    },
    timeout=10, follow_redirects=True\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}, len={len\(r.text\)}'\)
links = re.findall\(r'href=\\"/e/\([\\w-]+\)\\"', r.text\)
skip = \('modules', 'forum', 'offers', 'vendors', 'racks'\)
filtered = [l for l in links if not l.startswith\(skip\)]
print\('Module links:', filtered[:5]\)
")

")

from synthshop.integrations.modulargrid import fetch_module_page

    print\("Model:", result["model"]\)
    print\("HP:", result["hp"]\)
    print\("Discontinued:", result["discontinued"]\)
    print\("Subtitle:", result["subtitle"]\)
    print\(\)
    print\("Description:", result.get\("description"\)\)
    print\(\)
    print\("Features:", result.get\("features"\)\)
else:
    print\("No result!"\)
PYEOF)
